reportedIssues: Game cards in the right column are cut off by the viewport. Multiple thumbnails and titles are only partially visible, making the page look horizontally overflowing rather than neatly responsive.
The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the game grid content near the bottom of the screen. Some game cards are hidden behind the navigation bar.
The top category navigation is clipped on the right, with the 'Hot Games' tab only partially visible.
Some game artwork/text is truncated at the right edge, such as the partially visible 'Magnificent...' and other game cards.

expected.reasoning: None of the reported issues describe a highlighted/selected category being incorrect; all reported issues concern layout/clipping problems, not category selection state.
